name: Teferi, Time Raveler
oracle_text:
Each opponent can cast spells only any time they could cast a sorcery.
+1: Until your next turn, you may cast sorcery spells as though they had flash.
−3: Return up to one target artifact, creature, or enchantment to its owner's hand. Draw a card.
design_notes: A 3-mana planeswalker demonstrating several key patterns: (1) planeswalkers have loyalty instead of power/toughness, (2) abilities are formatted as +N/-N: effect, (3) static abilities on planeswalkers appear before loyalty abilities, (4) the 'Legendary' supertype and 'Planeswalker — Teferi' subtype show naming conventions. The asymmetric static ability (restricting opponents but not you) is a hallmark of powerful planeswalker design.
